name: Superauthentic Mexican Mole Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Tortilla or piece of toast, cut up
1 lb (about 3 medium) Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
[NOTE: Soak the chiles by removing stems, seeds, and veins in at least 2 cups of cold salted water with one tablespoon vinegar for at least one hour.]
Blend small amounts of the ingredients in an electric blender to make a coarse puree.
Heat 3 tablespoons lard in a saucepan.
Cook the puree in the hot lard, stirring constantly.
Add: 2 cups broth (turkey or pork, depending on what meat is being served) and 1.5 ounces of unsweetened chocolate squares.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir over low heat until the chocolate has melted. The sauce should be quite thick.
Pour the sauce over the meat in a casserole dish and cook covered over the lowest possible heat for thirty minutes.
Just before serving, sprinkle with 2 more tablespoons of sesame seeds.
Serves 8-10 (with about 8 lbs of meat).
